Investigating for clues Cursing at the tentacle token Drawing a mythos card with surge Placing doom on the agenda Reticulating spines Trying to make sense of the Time Warp FAQ Taking three damage and three horror No matching cards for "%s" No matching cards Cost: None All Cards Search for a card Clear "%s" search Apply Filters Player Cards Required Cards Alternate Cards FAQ Allowed Cards Test Icons: Show back Victory: %s. Vengeance: %s. Show front Deckbuilding Cards An unexpected error occurred (%s). If restarting the app doesn\'t fix the problem, tap here to reauthorize. Yig\'s Fury Doesn\'t comply with the Investigator requirements. Up by 5, hope I don\'t draw the tentacle Cards Settings Additional XP: %s. The List of Taboos is a list of Arkham Horror: The Card Game cards with optional deckbuilding restrictions or text changes. This list is designed to craft a healthy balance between investigator power and scenario difficulty, and to enforce shifts in deckbuilding environments over time. Adhering to The List of Taboos is completely optional. Investigators are not forced to adhere to the restrictions on this list, but if an investigator chooses to do so, they must do so in full (an investigator cannot pick and choose which restrictions to use). Note: not all cards have translations available. Taboo List Error loading cards, make sure your network is working. Loading latest cards… Charts Card Costs Card Factions Bonded Bound Cards Taboo No decks yet.\n\nUse the + button to create a new one. This deck does not seem to be part of a campaign yet.\n\nIf you add this deck to a campaign, the app can keep track of the available weaknesses between multiple decks.\n\nOtherwise, you can draw random weaknesses from your entire collection. There are no weaknesses that match these trait filters left in the set.\n\nPlease adjust the trait filter. Edit Assigned Weaknesses No campaigns yet.\n\nUse the + button to create a new one.\n\nYou can use this app to keep track of campaigns, including investigator trauma, the chaos bag, basic weaknesses, campaign notes and the experience values for all decks. Sort Base Version\n%s XP Current Version %s\n%s XP Latest Version %s\n%s XP Share Exiled cards Story cards to add - %s Story cards to add Story Cards - Existing Upgrade deck Saving… Flip Card Doom: %s Clues: %s%s Shroud: %s. Clues: %s%s. Update investigator decks By upgrading a deck, you can track XP and story card upgrades as your campaign develops.\n\nPrevious versions of your deck will still be accessible. Save and Upgrade Decks Only Save You can opt-in to always seeing taboos and building decks with them in Settings. Level %s All Eligible Cards Deckbuilding Warning: this card contains possible spoilers for \'%s\'. Pack Filters

In your Campaign Log, record that %s In your Campaign Log, under "%s", record %s. Add %s to the chaos bag. Remove %s from the chaos bag. Odds calculator Clean up broken campaigns %s (Campaign A) %s (Campaign B) Each investigator earns experience equal to the Victory X value of each card in the victory display. Victory display:
Each investigator pays %s experience point to play this scenario.
Each investigator pays %s experience points to play this scenario.
Import data Upgrade %s: %s of %s XP Upgrade %s: %s XP Delete broken deck Looks like we are having trouble loading this deck for some reason Parallel Random location Draw location Switch campaign Close Proceed without saving Proceed anyway It looks like one or more deck upgrades are unsaved. If you would like the app to track spent experience as you make deck changes, please go back and press \'Save deck upgrade\' on each investigator before proceeding to the next scenario.\n\nOnce an upgrade has been saved, you can edit the deck as normal and the app will properly track the experience cost for any changes you make (the original versions of the deck can still be viewed from the deck\'s menu). It looks like you edited the experience or trauma for an investigator, but have not saved it yet. Please go back and select ‘Save adjustments’ to ensure your changes are saved. Choose Side-Scenario Add side scenario Remove deck Remove deck from campaign Are you sure you want to remove this deck from the campaign?\n\nAfter removing the deck you will be able to select a different deck, but experience and story assets will only be saved as you complete new scenarios. Cannot remove Since this investigator has participated in one or more scenarios during this campaign, they cannot be removed.\n\nHowever, you can choose to have them not participate in future scenarios of this campaign. Experience cost: %s Custom side scenario Experience Cost Custom scenario Campaign A and Campaign B\nEight-part campaign Campaign A\nFour-part campaign Campaign B\nFour-part campaign Parallel investigator options should only be selected at deck creation time, not between scenarios. Advanced Cards Physical Mental Record trauma Defeated: physical trauma Defeated: mental trauma Defeated: no trauma The %s challenge scenario centers around the investigator %s, and therefore has the following prerequisites: %s must be chosen as one of the investigators when playing this scenario. The app does not enforce Challenge Scenario prerequisites, so please confirm that they apply manually. Play this scenario %s earns %s (Advanced). %s earns %s. %s removes %s (Advanced) %s removes %s Challenge Scenario %s Challenge Scenario Experience cost: %s for %s, %s for each other investigator Side Challenge Challenge scenarios are special print-and-play scenarios that utilize existing products in the Arkham Horror: The Card Game collection, along with additional print-and-play cards, to create new content. These scenarios are designed with certain prerequisites in mind, in order to craft a challenging puzzle-like experience. Printable cards can be downloaded from Fantasy Flight Games under the "Parallel Investigators" section. Download printable cards Return to Threads of Fate Return to Heart of the Elders Return to Shattered Aeons %s (included automatically) Return to The Forgotten Age Return to The Untamed Wilds Return to The Doom of Eztli Return to The Boundary Beyond Return to The City of Archives Return to The Depths of Yoth Save XP %s available experience, (%s spent) (Per Investigator) Use app for scenario setup & resolutions Track campaign log and resolutions manually Investigators If you encounter any problems with the campaign guide system, please let me know at arkhamcards@gmail.com. %s of %s spent Scenario or Interlude Alphabetize guide encounter sets Draw Weakness Note: Trauma from investigator defeat is handled during scenario resolution. Contact us
%s resupply
%s resupply
%s supply point
%s supply points
%s general / %s XP
%s general / %s XP
Side scenarios cannot be added to a campaign until the previous scenario and following interludes are completed. Unexpected file type Backup Data This app expects an Arkham Cards backup file (.acb/.json) This will let you backup your local decks and campaigns for safe-keeping. This can also be used to move them to another device. Save backup Cannot request access It looks like you previously denied allowing Arkham Cards to read/write external files. Please visit your System settings to adjust this permission, and try again.
(%s - %s scenario
%s - %s scenarios
Import Missing decks Import anyway New: Updated: Local version appears to be newer: Import selected data Select items to import Investigator trauma You can only edit trauma here between scenarios.\n\nDuring scenario play it can be edited using the scenario guide. Starting trauma can be adjusted after \'Campaign Setup\' has been completed. Confirm Download now Doesn\'t get any Checklist Limit 1 Covenant per deck. Checking for FAQ No entries at this time. Last Updated: %s Default (%s) Download language cards Not now Updated today Updated yesterday Updated %s Language Safe mode The app drew an Auto-Fail Sorry about that. If the app is crashing on launch, you can enter \'Safe mode\' to backup your data. Start normally Cache cleared Rules Encounter Card Errata The following questions contain light spoilers for this scenario. Show Spoilers Scenario FAQ Interlude FAQ Search player cards Search encounter cards Clear search filters Search game text Search card backs Dark Light Theme Enable Basic weakness Do not count towards deck size Menu Faction: %s, Level: %s Faction: %s, Cost: %s, Level: %s Faction: %s Encounter set: %s Health: none Sanity: none Health: %s Sanity: %s Willpower: %s Intellect: %s Combat: %s Agility: %s Search options Search in: Show all available cards Fight: %s Health: %s per investigator Health: %s Evade: %s Willpower: %s Intellect: %s Combat: %s Agility: %s Wild: %s Chaos bag is empty Bless Curse In Too Deep Devil Reef Horror in High Gear A Light in the Fog The Lair of Dagon Hidden Truths Into the Maelstrom Possible Suspects Possible Hideouts In Bag The Syzygy Coming soon Default Keep level %s after upgrade\nWon\'t count towards deck size Shrewd Analysis Rule
This upgrade will cost %s experience.
This upgrade will cost %s experience.
Two random cards will be chosen among the following choice:\n\n%s
Two random cards will be chosen among the following choices:\n\n%s
You can edit your collection under Settings to adjust the eligible choices. Additional Options: When you upgrade a [[Fortune]] or [[Gambit]] card, you may instead pay the full experience cost on the higher level version and leave the lower level version in your deck (it does not count towards your deck size or the number of copies of that card in your deck). Shrewd Analysis: If you meet the campaign conditions, you may use Shrewd Analysis to choose both upgrades randomly and only pay for one.\n\nNote: the app handles this by adjusting experience to account for the \'free\' upgrade. Upgrade results Upgrade with Shrewd Analysis The Pit of Despair Puzzle Pieces The Vanishing of Elina Harper Beneath the Waves Memories Recovered Note: this campaign is still being released and so the guide is incomplete (and may contain some mistakes).\nAs new scenarios are released, I will try to update the app promptly but there may be some slight delays. Slot: %s Search rules Signature Weakness Hide versatile cards Version to copy Updated Monday Updated Tuesday Updated Wednesday Updated Thursday Updated Friday Updated Saturday Updated Sunday Books Upgraded Added Removed Exiled Latest upgrade Add cards Deck #%s Tools For balancing and evaluating Check your deck stability For easy deck assembly Story assets and weaknesses Clone deck Open in browser Original front · Original back Parallel front · Original back Original front · Parallel back Parallel front · Parallel back Card count

%s · %s total

%s bound
%s unspent
%s unspent
Deck is invalid Show splash cards Hide splash cards Limited Slots %s of %s 0 unspent %s overspent Missing system permission Reads "%s" Sign in to Dissonant Voices? Dissonant Voices is an ongoing project by Mythos Busters to narrate the english scenario text for each Arkham Horror campaign. Are you sure you want to delete this standalone? Delete standalone Don\'t see your favorite Standalone scenario here? Let me know at arkhamcards@gmail.com, and I\'ll see about including it in a future release. New Standalone Create Standalone Asset Filters Sanity Assets: All Assets: %s Asset Act Agenda Enemy Treachery Location Actions Undo deck upgrade? Additional Options: When you upgrade a [[Spell]], you may instead pay the full experience cost on the higher level version and leave the lower level version in your deck (it does not count towards your deck size or the number of copies of that card in your deck). %s of %s XP spent Upgrading Editing Uploading deck If you have just completed a scenario, use the \'Upgrade\' button which will track changes. Select Parallel Investigator Upgrade experience Upgrading deck Editing deck Add scenario XP Draw simulator Upgrade with XP Unknown campaign Deck name Not enough cards (%s / %s). Too many cards (%s / %s). Undo deck change? Looks like you are trying to undo a deck save.\n\nThe app will NOT be able to undo these changes, so if you proceed again the changes might be applied twice. You should view the deck and manually undo the edits before reapplying the changes. Undo anyway Save deck changes It looks like one or more deck changes are unsaved. %s\'s Friends Friends Search for %s Friend Requests Pending Friend Requests Search for friends to add Search Results No results found for search \'%s\'. Clear search Search friends

%s Packs
Support Choose a handle for your account Your Friends This app works just fine without an account.\nBut signing in will allow you to sync campaigns between devices, with more features planned for the future.
%s pending request
%s pending requests
%s friend
%s friends
Account name Choose a handle Arkham Cards Account Looks like there is already an account registered with this email address. That doesn\'t look like a valid email address That password seems to be too weak. Your account has been disabled. There doesn\'t appear to be an account with that email address. Invalid password. Unknown error Email address Password Would you like to create a new account instead? Are you trying to sign in to an existing account? A password reset email has been sent to \'%s\'.\n\nPlease follow the instructions and then return to the app to continue. Would you like to reset your password via email? Sign up Sign in Using an Arkham Cards account will allow you to backup and sync your campaign data between devices.\nMore features are in the works. Sign in to your account Create a new account Sign up with email Sign in with email Sign out Sign in to app Authorization issues Reconnect Logged in Synchronize decks Log out Log in Narration enabled Audio narration Dissonant Voices Notes Free-form text records Achievements Upload campaign Can\'t add side scenario right now. Chaos Bag (%s) Save upgrade Earned experience: Sign out of Arkham Cards? Are you sure you want to sign out of Arkham Cards?\n\nAny campaigns you uploaded or have had shared with you will be removed from this device. They can be resynced if you sign in again.\n\nNote: if you have made recent changes while offline, they may be lost. Name required You must specify a name for custom campaigns. Export diagnostic data This feature is intended for advanced diagnostics. Just copy the data presented here and email it to arkhamcards@gmail.com Database migration required This should only take a few seconds and no network is required. Migrate now Agility Combat Intellect Willpower Boost Skill Boosts Skill Boosts: All If you run into any problems with this migration, please contact arkhamcards@gmail.com. Color blind friendly icons Uploading Note campaign achievements Complete campaign setup Review and draw tokens Spent experience Continue Start View results Skipped Locked Add scenario result Record completed scenario Add XP from scenario Review scenario results Edit chaos bag Scenario name
%s XP unspent
%s XP unspent
Tap to draw Draw another Return tokens Seal tokens Release all Remove all bless & curse tokens do not remove View chaos bag Sealed tokens Decks with Ancestral Knowledge must include at least 10 skills. %s / %s cards Ammo Bounties Charges Keys Locks Resources Secrets Tickets Tries Whistles Loading… Campaign players Add friends to campaign Add friends Access Searching cards… Leave campaign Are you sure you want to leave this campaign?\n\nYour decks will be removed from the campaign, but you can rejoin it later. Leave Edit players View players Clear card cache Uploading… Leave standalone Are you sure you want to leave this standalone?\n\nYour decks will be removed from the standalone, but you can rejoin it later. Upload standalone You must be online to upload Adjust scenario XP and trauma Unspent XP %s saved Scenario Card - %s Scenario Card %s and %s Dark Matter Impending Doom Memories Fan-Made Campaigns Fetching account details… Thanks for signing up for Arkham Cards.\n\nFirst of all, you\'ll need to create a handle for your account. People will be able to search for friends using their handle so you can join their campaigns. Now that you are signed in, you should have access to your saved campaigns. Campaigns can now be \'uploaded\' so they can be synced between devices or shared with friends. Welcome Download print and play cards %s (from XP) Exiled story cards Exile story cards Fan-made scenario by %s If you are a custom content creator who has a "finished" campaign you\'d like to see in the app, contact me at arkhamcards@gmail.com. Custom campaigns are a fair amount of work, but I\'d love to support the community in anyway I can. Alice in Wonderland Fragments of Alice Wonderland Boons Wonderland Banes Strength of Wonderland Edge of the Earth You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Guardian or Neutral You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Seeker or Neutral You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Rogue or Neutral You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Mystic or Neutral You cannot have more than 5 cards that are not Survivor or Neutral You must have at least 7 cards from 3 different factions You cannot have more than 15 level 0-1 Seeker and/or Mystic cards You cannot have more than 5 Guardian and/or Mystic cards You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Mystic cards Choose resolution Choose investigator to record trauma Defeated Status of investigators Social Add new Changes have been recorded. No adjustments need saving. When you have finished making adjustments, press the \'Save\' button to record your changes. This deck will be upgraded with XP and any new story cards will be added or removed as specified. (new total: %s) Earned XP: Saved This investigator does not have a deck associated with it.\nIf you choose a deck, the app can help track spent experience, story asset changes, and deckbuilding requirements. Now that your upgrade has been saved, when visiting the deck be sure to use the \'Edit\' button when making card changes. What exactly does the app handle? Generally speaking, the app handles anything that you see mentioned in the digital campaign log.\nIf you are building your deck with the app, it will also handle cards like Arcane Research and Shrewd Analysis (if you allow the app to randomize your upgrades).\nIf you find that you made a mistake after you upgraded your deck, you can \'adjust\' the available experience when editing a deck. The numbers below already include all the trauma, victory points, and story assets you may have earned during the resolution.\n\nIf you have any other cards or effects that the app does not take care of, you can make adjustments below before saving each investigator. Learn more Campaign log Record in campaign log Review and add records Draw random Record Scenario effects Scenario Ended Proceed to Resolutions Choose trauma type Chosen trauma type Random results Select Traits Random weaknesses will be drawn that match these traits. Edit selection Check Campaign Log. If %s Discord VK Telegram In your Campaign Log, under "%s", record %s. In your Campaign Log, under "%s", cross out %s. Unarchive campaign Archive campaign Show archived campaigns Return to The Circle Undone Prologue: Return to Disappearance at the Twilight Estate Return to The Witching Hour Return to At Death\'s Doorstep Return to The Secret Name Return to The Wages of Sin Return to For the Greater Good Return to Union and Disillusion Return to In the Clutches of Chaos Return to Before the Black Throne Loading account Choose an investigator to add %s to their deck: Show card Crown of Egil The Crown of Egil Traces of Egil Fan-made campaign by %s Sorry, you don\'t seem to be a Mythos Buster patron.\nIt can take up to 24hrs before Patreon updates your membership status. If you are still experiencing problems after 24hrs, please contact Mythos Busters via Patreon or on the Discord channel for help with this issue. Skull Cultist Tablet Elder Thing Auto-Fail Elder Sign Number of [[Item]] assets you control Your investigator\'s modifier 0: (original effect below)\n%s Easy difficulty Standard difficulty Hard difficulty Expert difficulty Scenario settings Test difficulty Modified skill
%s/%s token
%s/%s tokens
Show all cards Disable to choose individual packs to show All cards are shown throughout the app Use these controls to limit which cards are visible while searching, building decks, or upgrading cards to those in your own collection. All Cycles and Packs Record that… Player card entries only Accept friend request Send friend request Reject friend request Revoke friend request Show upgrades Hide Bless/Curse Odds Show Bless/Curse Odds You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Survivor cards You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Guardian cards You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Seeker cards You cannot have more than 5 level 0 Rogue cards Sign into Arkham Cards on the Settings tab to enable %s of %s %s Choose deck Frost Database reset Please close and restart the app Reset card database Mythos Busters The card database has been reset.\n\nPlease close the app and restart it to trigger a full sync of card data. Beta testing Edit Weakness Cards Narrate Negative modifier %s, draws another Fix duplicates Do you want to use the app to choose a random partner? Select more Record damage/horror: Expedition Team In the %s section of the Campaign Log, cross out %s, In the %s section of the Campaign Log, write "MIA" next to %s. In the %s section of the Campaign Log, cross out "MIA" next to %s. If the lead investigator was driven insane. If all investigators were driven insane. If the lead investigator is still alive. If all investigators are still alive. The Entity Resolute MIA A side-story is a scenario that may be played between any two scenarios of an Arkham Horror: The Card Game campaign.\n- Playing a side-story costs each investigator in the campaign a certain amount of experience, which should be paid when you start the scenario.\n- Weaknesses, trauma, experience, and rewards granted by playing a side-story stay with the investigators for the remainder of the campaign.\n- Each side-story may only be played once per campaign.\n\nNote: When using this app, the experience required to play these scenarios will be deducted automatically at the end of the scenario, but you should be sure you have sufficient experience set aside to pay for it. Ice and Death: Part 1 Ice and Death: Part 2 Ice and Death: Part 3 Restful Night To the Forbidden Peaks Endless Night City of the Elder Things Final Night The Heart of Madness: Part 1 The Heart of Madness: Part 2 Fatal Mirage Fatal Mirage - Memories Discovered Fatal Mirage - Memories Banished Ice and Death - Locations Revealed Ice and Death - Supplies Recovered The Heart of Madness - Seals Placed The Heart of Madness - Seals Recovered You may heal 1 physical or mental trauma (your choice) In the %s section of the Campaign Log, draw a check mark next to %s. Choose heal type Chosen heal type Review and draw weaknesses Choose expansions for basic weakness Uploading campaign
%s (choose %s)
%s (choose %s)
This deck is owned by another player. You can record the upgrade now and they will be given an opportunity to save the changes to their deck when they next open the app. Changes have been recorded. You can apply these changes to your deck on the main screen of the campaign under your investigator. Changes have been recorded. The owner of this deck can apply these changes to their deck on the main screen of the campaign under their investigator. Tarot card Tarot card: %s Select tarot card Which tarot card is impacting the chaos bag? Replace highest non-negative token with a skull. Replace a skull with a 0 token. Judgement · XX Judgement · XX (Inverted) The Fool · 0 Each investigator not defeated during this game earns +2 experience during its resolution. Each investigator defeated during this game earns -2 experience during its resolution. The Magician · I Each investigator begins the game with 3 addititonal resources Each investigator begins the game with 3 fewer resources, and cannot gain resources during their first turn. The High Priestess · II During the first [intellect] test each investigator performs each round, they get +1 [intellect]. During the first [intellect] test each investigator performs each round, they get -1 [intellect]. The Empress · III During the first [agility] test each investigator performs each round, they get +1 [agility]. During the first [agility] test each investigator performs each round, they get -1 [agility]. The Emperor · IV During the first [combat] test each investigator performs each round, they get +1 [combat]. During the first [combat] test each investigator performs each round, they get -1 [combat]. The Hierophant · V During the first [willpower] test each investigator performs each round, they get +1 [willpower]. During the first [willpower] test each investigator performs each round, they get -1 [willpower]. The Lovers · VI When the game begins, each investigator searches their deck for an Ally asset, adds it to their hand, and shuffles their deck. When the game begins, each investigator searches their deck for an Ally asset, removes it from the game, and shuffles their deck. The Chariot · VII Each investigator begins the game with 2 additional cards in their opening hand. Each investigator begins the game with 2 fewer cards in their opening hand, and cannot draw cards during their first turn. Strength · VIII When the game begins, each investigator may play an asset from their hand at -2 cost. During the first round of the game, each investigator cannot play assets. The Hermit · IX Increase each investigator\'s maximum hand size by 3. Decrease each investigator\'s maximum hand size by 3. Wheel of Fortune · X Once each act, when an investigator reveals an [auto_fail] token, thte investigator may cancel it and treat it as a 0 token instead. Once each agenda, the first time any investigator reveals an [elder_sign] token, cancel it and treat it as a -5 token instead. Justice · XI Cancel the first doom that would be placed on the final agenda of the game. The final agenda of the game enters play with 1 doom on it. The Hanged Man · XII During setup, each investigator may take up to 2 additional mulligans. Each investigator cannot mulligan or replace weaknesses in their opening hand (resolve their revelation abilities when the game begins). Death · XIII Each investigator gets +1 health. Each investigator gets -1 health. Temperance · XIV Each investigator gets +1 sanity. Each investigator gets -1 sanity. The Devil · XV Each investigator has 1 additional slot of a type chosen by that investigattor when the game begins. Each investigator has 3 fewer slots, each of a different type, chosen by that investigator when the game begins. The Tower · XVI Each investigator chooses 1 basic weakness in their deck and removes it from the game (return them after the game ends). Add 1 random basic weakness to each investigator\'s deck. Remove them after the game ends. The Star · XVII After an investigator reveals an [elder_sign] token during a skill test, they may heal 1 damage or 1 horror. After an investigator reveals an [auto_fail] token during a skill test, they must either take 1 damage or 1 horror. The Moon · XVIII The first time each investigator\'s deck would run out of cards, they may shuffle the bottom 10 cards of their discard pile back into their deck. When the game begins, each investigator discards the top 5 cards of their deck. Shuffle each discarded weakness into its owner\'s deck. The Sun · XIX During each investigator\'s first turn, they may take 2 additional actions. During each investigator\'s first turn, they have 2 fewer actions to take. When the game begins, replace a [skull] token in the chaos bag with a 0 token. Swap them back after the game ends. When the game begins, replace the highest non-negative token in the chaos bag with a [skull] token. Swap them back after the game ends. The World · XXI Each investigator not defeated during this game may remove 1 trauma of their choice during its resolution. Each investigator defeated during this game suffers 1 trauma of their choice during its resolution. An app update is required to access this campaign. Side Deck Edit Side Deck Creating campaign… Creating standalone… Campaign will be synced between devices and can be shared with friends Campaign will be local to this device, you can choose to upload it later

Guardians of the Abyss Two-part campaign variant Claim previous scenario XP Apply changes from last completed scenario Hide campaign decks Select Standalone Add %s: Select %s Note: This should only be selected at deck creation time, not between scenarios. Translation:\n• Spanish: %s\n• French: %s\n• German: %s\n• Russian: %s\n• Korean: %s Additional Contributions:\n• Visual Design: %s\n• Digital chaos bag + odds calculator: %s\n• Dissonant Voices audio integration: %s\n• Tooling and build support: %s Icon Attribution:\n• Original icon designs: %s Call of the Plaguebearer Eliminated Locations Login required to save deck upgrade Note: this campaign is a fairly new addition to the app and may contain some mistakes. Durability Leylines Offerings Patrol Consternation on the Constellation Deck contains custom content Player Barkham Horror Show all available cards for parallel Show fan-made cards Reset onboarding Signing into Arkham Cards will let you backup your campaigns between your devices and share in-progress campaigns with other friends. Recent updates Learn about recently added features Using an Arkham Cards account will allow you to backup and sync your campaign data between devices.\n\nYou can also upload in-progress campaigns and share them with friends and even share a synchronized chaos bag. Sync campaigns to share with friends Sharing campaigns Sign up with Arkham Cards Upload a campaign Add a friend Enjoy the campaign Did you know campaigns can be shared with friends using this app? Other investigator cards Ultimatum of Chaos Generate deck - Adjust your card collection in the app settings. - Remove the parallel investigator choice, which might require a larger card collection. - Remove the taboo list, which removes some card options. Unable to build a random deck for this investigator:\n%s Starter deck Unable to generate deck Suggested starter deck for this investigator from FFG. An empty deck. Sorry, the app cannot generate random decks for this investigator yet. A fully randomized deck. Special deck Re-generate deck Draft from card collection Disable to choose which packs to draft from Draft using your card collection Draft Pool Invalid deck This deck is currently invalid in some way. Please address the issues before continuing the draft. Hand size: Choose packs This tool lets you build a deck progressively, choosing one card at a time from a limited set of cards. Each \'hand\' of cards is taken at random from all possible cards that are allowed given the current investigator + deckbuilding option choices you have made. The drafting process will continue until your deck is full, but you can stop or change the settings at any time Begin draft Selection Draft cards Please correct invalid deck issues This deck currently contains one or more forbidden cards.\n\nPlease address these outstanding deck issues before drafting cards. Deck is full This deck is full.\n\nRemove some cards or create a new deck if you would like to draft.\n\nAt the moment it is only possible to draft level 0 cards using the app. Deck id copied! Link to deck copied! Build a deck randomly Campaigns Cycles Take If you are using the digital chaos bag in the app, be sure to enable the tarot option on the chaos bag screen. Show deck ids on campaigns Tarot Reading Tarot Readings Perform readings with the tarot deck What is this? Choose two cards to reverse. Reverse half of the cards (rounded up). Choose one card. Draw and reverse cards however you like! Reveal %s - Inverted Inverted Upright A single card in a random position. Two cards, one upright and one reversed. Reveal three upright cards, choose two to reverse. A reading for the full campaign. Choose from three upright cards. A single reversed card. Draw cards in random positions. Choose reading type You must flip all cards to reveal your fate. Too many card reversed (%s / %s) Not enough cards reversed (%s / %s) Reject fate (redraw) Deck Id Symphony of Erich Zann %s (inverted) Destiny Tarot Reading The Tatterdemalion Electric Nightmare Mission Briefing Lost Quantum In the Shadow of Earth Strange Moons Introspection The Machine in Yellow Fragment of Carcosa Starfall Arkham in Wonderland The Dodo A Sea of Troubles The Caterpillar Tempest in a Teapot The Duchess Bleeding Hearts Gryphon and Mock Turtle Wild Snark Chase Humpty Dumpty Sibling Rivalry The Lion and the Unicorn Fool\'s Mate The White Queen Lucid Nightmare Delete your account Loading account details… Are you sure that you want to permanently delete your account? You can record the changes now and they will be given an opportunity to save them to their deck when they next open the app. Time Passed Bearer You cannot have more than 5 Seeker and/or Survivor cards You cannot have more than 5 Mystic and/or Survivor cards Fan-made Investigators Fortune and Folly Challenge Scenarios Choose an option Choose weakness Do you want to use the app to draw random tarot cards? Choose tarot card Choose supplies: Asset Class Choice Skill Class Choice Event Class Choice If you wish to add a side-story to this campaign, you may travel to this location and spend additional time equal to the normal experience for playing that side story. Use expedited ticket Time cost: %s Additional experience cost for %s: %s A side-story is a scenario that may be played between any two scenarios of an Arkham Horror: The Card Game campaign.\n- Because you are playing The Scarlet Keys campaign, a side-story costs a certain amount of time instead of experience.\n- Weaknesses, trauma, experience, and rewards granted by playing a side-story stay with the investigators for the remainder of the campaign.\n- Each side-story may only be played once per campaign.

This draft uses the deck\'s selected card pool.
